articles.title: Billionaire Chamath Palihapitiya Calls FTX Implosion a Sophisticated Con Perpetrated on Millions of People
articles.description: Billionaire venture capitalist Chamath Palihapitiya says collapsed crypto exchange FTX was an “enormous financial fraud” that impacted tens of millions of people. In a new interview on the All-In Podcast, Palihapitiya says disgraced former FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried is manipulating the media for a second time with his ongoing “apology tour.” “[Bankman-Fried] went to the […]

articles.title: ConsenSys Says It Does Not Sell Any MetaMask User Data, Plans To Store It for Only Seven Days
articles.description: Ethereum (ETH) software company ConsenSys is once again responding to the controversy sparked by its recent update to its terms of service. Last month, ConsenSys updated its term of service to collect user data such as names, IP addresses, dates of birth, usernames, contact information and gender. The firm later addressed the privacy concerns in […]

articles.title: Crypto is under-taxed in the US. Here's what Congress can do to change that.
articles.description: Crypto traders don’t have to move their funds offshore to evade US taxes, as long as the US government allows wash trading of the nascent asset class. Read more...

articles.title: Warner Music, Polygon and LGND partner to launch Web3 music platform
articles.description: The platform LGND Music is set to officially launch in January 2023, and will also include dance record label Spinnin’ Records.

articles.title: Tether launches CNH₮, a stablecoin pegged to Chinese Yuan
articles.description: Tether, a leading provider of blockchain-based financial services, has launched an offshore Chinese Yuan-backed stablecoin.

articles.title: Chainlink launches staking to increase the security of oracle services
articles.description: Stakers will earn Chainlink tokens as they participate in a decentralized alerting system that flags the network when feeds are not meeting performing requirements.

articles.title: Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin says AI is ‘quite far’ from replacing human programmers
articles.description: Vitalik Buterin has some good news for programmers who might be worried they could be made redundant by AI — it's simply not that good yet.

articles.title: Bull Market Signal? Jim Cramer Advises Crypto Investors to Sell
articles.description: Cramer believes Ripple (XRP), Dogecoin (DOGE), Cardano (ADA), and Polygon (MATIC) could crash to zero in the future.

articles.title: Binance CEO calls Sam Bankman-Fried ‘one of the greatest fraudsters in history’
articles.description: Binance CEO Changpeng “CZ” Zhao branded former FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried “one of the greatest fraudsters in history” in a tweet on Tuesday.

articles.title: Tether Announced Upcoming Launch of Tether Gold (XAU₮) and Euro Tether (EUR₮) Starting December 8th
articles.description: Coinspeaker Tether Announced Upcoming Launch of Tether Gold (XAU₮) and Euro Tether (EUR₮) Starting December 8th Huobi Global says that customers will soon be able to access Tether Gold and Euro Tether stablecoins, representing ownership of assets. Tether Announced Upcoming Launch of Tether Gold (XAU₮) and Euro Tether (EUR₮) Starting December 8th

articles.title: Peter Schiff And Jim Cramer Present Their Doom Scenarios For Bitcoin, Cardano, XRP, Dogecoin
articles.description: Notorious CNBC host Jim Cramer has once again made controversial predictions for Bitcoin and the crypto market in the latest episode of the show “Mad Money”. Cramer has made a name for himself on the crypto scene in recent years, but possibly to the extent that he wanted to. Cramer’s mixed track record in crypto-analysis led to the creation of the “Inverse Cramer ETF,” a fictional exchange-traded fund that recommends the opposite of everything Cramer says. Great news for crypto! pic.twitter.com/

articles.title: Crypto Lender Nexo to Leave the USA After Discussions with Regulators Hit a Stalemate
articles.description: Major crypto lender Nexo will be leaving the United States over the next few months, as the company was unable to reach an agreement with the country's regulators. In a blog post published on Monday, Nexo stated that it would be "phasing out its products and services in the United States in a gradual and orderly fashion over the coming months."... Read More: Crypto Lender Nexo to Leave the USA After Discussions with Regulators Hit a Stalemate

articles.title: Crypto.com Partners with Coca-Cola to Launch World Cup NFTs as CRO Token Surges 10%
articles.description: Coinspeaker Crypto.com Partners with Coca-Cola to Launch World Cup NFTs as CRO Token Surges 10% Player "heatmaps" from the ongoing FIFA World Cup 2022 Matches will be used to create 10,000 NFTs that will be hosted on Crypto.com’s blockchain. Crypto.com Partners with Coca-Cola to Launch World Cup NFTs as CRO Token Surges 10%
